name: Omon.mlotstmax
title: Maximum Ocean Mixed Layer Thickness Defined by Delta Sigma T of 0.03 kg m-3 referenced to the model level closest to 10 m depth
description: Sigma T is potential density referenced to ocean surface. Defined by Sigma T of 0.03 kg m-3 wrt to model level closest to 10 m depth.
processing note: dsigmat coordinate added to clarify definition.Report on native horizontal grid as well as on a spherical latitude/longitude grid.
